products.name: Sheer Ankle Socks — Polka Dot
products.description: Women's sheer ankle socks in a classic black polka-dot mesh. Lightweight nylon with a soft elastic cuff, reinforced heel and toe for everyday elegance with flats, loafers, or heels.

products.name: Sheer Crew Socks — Floral
products.description: Delicate sheer crew socks with a soft floral motif. Breathable mesh body, opaque cuff, heel, and toe — refined enough for formal looks, comfortable enough for all day.

products.name: Sheer Crew Socks — Star
products.description: Sheer cream crew socks patterned with crisp white stars. Ultra-thin nylon with a secure ribbed cuff and reinforced finish for a polished, barely-there feel.

products.name: Sheer Nude Ankle Socks
products.description: Essential sheer nude ankle socks designed for a smooth, barely-there look. Soft elastic cuff, reinforced heel and toe — perfect under loafers, flats, and formal shoes.

products.name: Over-Knee Socks — Mosaic
products.description: Statement over-knee socks in a soft white mosaic knit. Stretch comfort from cuff to toe with a modern geometric texture that elevates casual and dress looks alike.

products.name: Mesh Ankle Socks — Beige Pack
products.description: Breathable beige mesh ankle socks with reinforced toe and heel. A versatile everyday staple with a slim profile that disappears under sneakers and loafers.

products.name: Sheer Nude Socks — Everyday
products.description: Fine sheer nude socks for everyday wear. Lightweight, breathable, and shaped for a natural skin-tone finish with a comfortable elastic cuff.

products.name: Sheer Detail Ankle Socks
products.description: Refined sheer ankle socks with a clean silhouette and soft stretch. Designed for all-day comfort and an elegant finish with any shoe.
